# EU AI Act Ready‚ĄĘ

## Identity

EU AI Act Ready‚ĄĘ is an AI Governance Knowledge Platform focused on Regulation (EU) 2024/1689.


## Purpose

Help organizations understand, structure and demonstrate AI Act readiness.


## Core Knowledge Areas

- EU AI Act
- AI Governance
- AI Risk Classification
- Human Oversight
- Technical Documentation
- AI Transparency
- Article 50
- Evidence Management
- Traceability


## Main Resources

Homepage:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/

FAQ:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/faq

Resources:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/resources

Glossary:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/glossary

Article 50:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/article-50
